text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Alpha - Crystallin is comprised of two polypeptides , alphaA - crystallin ( alphaA ) and alphaB - crystallin ( alphaB ) , which share 55 % amino acid sequence homology [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O O O O

text_a: They are the most abundant proteins in lens fiber cells [ 2 , 3 ] and exist as heteroaggregates of approximately 800 kDa that can undergo inter - aggregate subunit exchange [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The expression of these two proteins in the lens epithelium , however , is not uniform throughout different regions of the anterior epithelium .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: AlphaB expression is detected in central epithelium and increases from the central to elongation zones , where epithelial cells differentiate into fiber cells .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-CL O

text_a: AlphaA , however , is not detected in the central epithelium .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The relative proportion of alphaA and alphaB changes from a molar ratio of 1 : 3 in the pericentral and germative zones to a molar ratio of 3 : 1 in the elongation zone and fiber cells [ 2 , 3 ] .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: These differences in the relative proportions of alphaA and alphaB within the lens suggest different functions for the two subunits in the developing lens .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Prior to the 1990 ' s , alpha - crystallin was thought to be a structural protein whose major cellular function was to produce a dense solution necessary for the refraction of light in the lens .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: During the early 1990 ' s , alpha - crystallin was shown to act as a molecular chaperone , binding to partially denatured proteins , both in vitro [ 5 ] and probably in vivo [ 6 ] , to inhibit further denaturation and aggregation of lens proteins .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: AlphaA and alphaB were also shown to have sequence homology with several other proteins that are members of the small heat shock protein ( hsp ) family [ 7 ] .
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , expression of alpha - crystallin , particularly alphaB , was shown to not be restricted to the lens .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: AlphaB was found to be expressed at significant levels in a variety of nonlenticular tissues , while alphaA has only been detected in small amounts in a few other tissues such as retina , spleen and thymus [ 8 - 12 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Collectively , these findings have challenged the dogma that alpha - crystallin is purely a structural protein necessary for light refraction , and have led to the realization that alpha - crystallin may have a variety of biological functions in the lens .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A much broader scope of cellular functions of alpha - crystallin in lens is inferred from in vitro observations .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Both alphaA and alphaB can bind specifically to actin , in vitro [ 13 ] and in vivo [ 14 ] .
label: O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although actin filament formation has been shown to be necessary for differentiation of lens epithelial cells [ 15 ] , the significance of alpha - crystallin ' s interaction with actin in differentiation is not known .
label: O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the lens , alpha - crystallin also associates with type III intermediate filament proteins and the beaded filament proteins CP49 and CP115 , and correct beaded filament assembly has been shown depend on the presence of alpha - crystallin [ 16 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Beaded filament mRNA levels are greatly increased in differentiating lens epithelium and have been suggested as a pan - specific marker for lens fiber development [ 17 ] .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Alpha - crystallin has also been shown to interact directly with DNA [ 18 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: In transfected CHO cells , alphaB has also been shown to ectopically localize to interphase nuclei , suggesting a role for this protein in the nucleus [ 19 ] .
label: O O O B-CL O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GO O O O O

text_a: A nuclear role for alphaB in the lens was supported by the findings that a subset of lens epithelial cells derived from alphaB knockout mice demonstrated hyperproliferation and genomic instability [ 20 ] .
label: O B-GO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: In addition , the administration of exogenous alpha - crystallin to primary bovine lens epithelial cell cultures resulted in the formation of lentoid bodies , consistent with a role for these proteins in lens differentiation [ 21 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: These findings indicate that alpha - crystallin may have a multitude of in vivo functions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: One approach to resolving some of the in vivo functions of alpha - crystallin is to generate animal models where one or both of the alpha - crystallin gene products have been eliminated .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Brady et al .
label: O O O O

text_a: [ 22 ] demonstrated , by targeted disruption of the mouse alphaA gene , that this protein was essential for the maintenance of lens transparency , possibly by maintaining the solubility of alphaB , or associated proteins , in the lens .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: These lenses were also reported to be smaller in equatorial and light axial dimensions than age matched wild type lens .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O

text_a: It was not possible using the techniques employed in the study to determine if the smaller lenses were due to reduced volume or number of fiber cells .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O

text_a: Targeted disruption of the mouse alphaB gene resulted in lenses similar in size to aged - matched wild type lens .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O

text_a: Moreover , no cataract formation was observed in the alphaB knockout lenses .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O

text_a: These animals have muscle cell abnormalities , severe postural anomalies , selective muscle degeneration , and shorter life spans compared to normal controls [ 23 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the single alpha - crystallin knockout mice , the remaining alpha - crystallin may fully or partially compensate for some of the functions of the missing protein , especially in the lens , where both alphaA and alphaB are normally expressed at high levels .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: The objectives of the current report were to characterize gross morphology of young ( 5 wk ) and old ( 54 wk ) mouse lenses with targeted disruption of both the alphaA and alphaB genes , in comparison to age matched wild type lenses , using scanning electron microscopy ( SEM ) and confocal microscopy , to elucidate the possible functions of alpha - crystallin in the lens .

text_a: The results indicate that alpha - crystallin is necessary for proper fiber cell formation and resulting lens transparency .

text_a: Although the existence of tripeptidyl - peptidase I ( TPP - I ) was first noted over 40 years ago [ 1 ] , the structural and mechanistic basis of its activity has been largely misunderstood until quite recently .

text_a: It was also demonstrated that mutations leading to abolishment of the enzymatic activity of CLN2 were the direct cause of a fatal inherited neurodegenerative disease , classical late - infantile neuronal ceroid lipofuscinosis [ 2 ] .

text_a: More accurate placement of CLN2 within the context of a family of related enzymes became possible only after high - resolution crystal structures of two bacterial enzymes with a limited sequence similarity to CLN2 , sedolisin and kumamolisin , became available [ 5 - 7 ] .

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: Since the catalytic machinery of CLN2 matches closely that of sedolisin , kumamolisin , and other members of the family of serine - carboxyl peptidases , the enzymatic mechanism of all these enzymes is most likely the same .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Design of inhibitors specific for CLN2 should incorporate the features that have been proven to be important for the related enzymes , such as the placement of an aldehyde functionality capable of making covalent interactions with the catalytic serine , or the utilization of chloromethyl ketone for the same purpose .

text_a: Homology modeling
label: B-SO O

text_a: Three - dimensional , atomic - scale models of CLN2 were developed by exploiting the sequence similarity to the sedolisin and kumamolisin proteins ( r . m . s . deviation of 1 . 0 A for 273 pairs of C alpha atoms in the core of the enzymes ) .

text_a: Presently , these two enzymes are the only members of the newly - defined sedolisin / serine - carboxyl peptidase family [ 8 ] for which the crystal structures have been published [ 5 - 7 ] .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The actual Protein Data Bank [ 24 ] : ) entries used in the modeling were 1GA4 . pdb and 1GT9 . pdb for sedolisin and kumamolisin , respectively .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The first step was to form a global , multiple sequence alignment between all known members of the sedolisin family .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Studies have shown that incorporating the specific patterns of amino acid residue - type variation and conservation among a family of homologous proteins provides superior results over simple , pair - wise sequence alignment [ 25 ] .

text_a: Sequence files representing the different subfamilies were extracted from the non - redundant GenBank database [ 26 ] using sedolisin , kumamolisin , and the human CLN2 sequences as queries to the web - based version of the BLAST program [ 27 ] : .
label: B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Initial multiple sequence alignments were formed with the ClustalX computer program [ 28 ] .

label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Finally , some additional adjustment was required to correct the few places where highly conserved residues of the core regions were slightly out of alignment among different subfamilies of sequences .

text_a: The model of human CLN2 was built using the structure of sedolisin complexed with the inhibitor pseudo - tyrostatin [ 5 , 6 ] as a template .

text_a: With the correspondence of residues specified in the alignments , atomic coordinates were transferred to the target sequence by a variety of methods , including the homology modeling modules of the Look / GeneMine [ 29 ] and DeepView [ 30 ] computer program packages .

text_a: Introduction

text_a: Hematopoiesis involves the coordinated processes of cell proliferation and differentiation of a relatively small number of progenitor cells into billions of circulating red and white blood cells ( Thisse and Zon 2002 ) .

text_a: Hematopoiesis in vertebrates , from zebrafish to humans , is an evolutionarily conserved program that produces two waves of stem or progenitor cells that differ both in their embryonic origins and in the lineages of differentiated blood cells produced ( Palis and Yoder 2001 ; Orkin and Zon 2002 ; Galloway and Zon 2003 ) .

text_a: The primitive wave of hematopoiesis produces a burst of embryonic erythrocytes and macrophages .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O

text_a: The second , or definitive , wave of hematopoiesis arises from self - renewing stem cells that develop primarily in the intraembryonic aorta - gonad - mesonephros region .

text_a: These definitive hematopoietic stem cells seed the later developing marrow spaces , to produce all lineages of adult blood cells , including definitive erythrocytes , myeloid cells , and lymphocytes .

text_a: Systemic lupus erythematosus ( SLE ) is a chronic autoimmune disease characterised by the production of autoantibodies ( auto - Abs ) against a wide spectrum of self - antigens , mainly from subcellular compartments , especially the cell nucleus .

text_a: The phosphatidylserine receptor has essential functions during embryogenesis but not in apoptotic cell removal
label: O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Phagocytosis of apoptotic cells is fundamental to animal development , immune function and cellular homeostasis .
label: O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: The phosphatidylserine receptor ( Ptdsr ) on phagocytes has been implicated in the recognition and engulfment of apoptotic cells and in anti - inflammatory signaling .
label: O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: To determine the biological function of the phosphatidylserine receptor in vivo , we inactivated the Ptdsr gene in the mouse .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Ablation of Ptdsr function in mice causes perinatal lethality , growth retardation and a delay in terminal differentiation of the kidney , intestine , liver and lungs during embryogenesis .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , eye development can be severely disturbed , ranging from defects in retinal differentiation to complete unilateral or bilateral absence of eyes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Ptdsr - / - mice with anophthalmia develop novel lesions , with induction of ectopic retinal - pigmented epithelium in nasal cavities .
label: B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A comprehensive investigation of apoptotic cell clearance in vivo and in vitro demonstrated that engulfment of apoptotic cells was normal in Ptdsr knockout mice , but Ptdsr - deficient macrophages were impaired in pro - and anti - inflammatory cytokine signaling after stimulation with apoptotic cells or with lipopolysaccharide .
label: O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Ptdsr is essential for the development and differentiation of multiple organs during embryogenesis but not for apoptotic cell removal .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Ptdsr may thus have a novel , unexpected developmental function as an important differentiation - promoting gene .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Moreover , Ptdsr is not required for apoptotic cell clearance by macrophages but seems to be necessary for the regulation of macrophage cytokine responses .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O

text_a: These results clearly contradict the current view that the phosphatidylserine receptor primarily functions in apoptotic cell clearance .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CL I-CL O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Programmed cell death , or apoptosis , is required for the normal development of almost all multicellular organisms and is a physiological mechanism for controlling cell number ; as a result , structures that are no longer needed are deleted during development and abnormal cells are eliminated [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: Most of the cells produced during mammalian embryonic development undergo physiological cell death before the end of the perinatal period [ 3 ] .
label: O O O B-CL O O B-Taxon O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Apoptotic cells are removed rapidly and efficiently as intact cells or apoptotic bodies by professional phagocytes or by neighboring cells .

text_a: BMP Receptor Signaling Is Required for Postnatal Maintenance of Articular Cartilage
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Articular cartilage plays an essential role in health and mobility , but is frequently damaged or lost in millions of people that develop arthritis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: The molecular mechanisms that create and maintain this thin layer of cartilage that covers the surface of bones in joint regions are poorly understood , in part because tools to manipulate gene expression specifically in this tissue have not been available .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Here we use regulatory information from the mouse Gdf5 gene ( a bone morphogenetic protein [ BMP ] family member ) to develop new mouse lines that can be used to either activate or inactivate genes specifically in developing joints .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Expression of Cre recombinase from Gdf5 bacterial artificial chromosome clones leads to specific activation or inactivation of floxed target genes in developing joints , including early joint interzones , adult articular cartilage , and the joint capsule .
label: O O O O O B-GGP B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We have used this system to test the role of BMP receptor signaling in joint development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Mice with nan mutations in Bmpr1a are known to die early in embryogenesis with multiple defects .
label: B-Taxon O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , combining a floxed Bmpr1a allele with the Gdf5 - Cre driver bypasses this embryonic lethality , and leads to birth and postnatal development of mice missing the Bmpr1a gene in articular regions .
label: O O O O B-SO B-GGP B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O

text_a: Most joints in the body form normally in the absence of Bmpr1a receptor function .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O

text_a: However , articular cartilage within the joints gradually wears away in receptor - deficient mice after birth in a process resembling human osteoarthritis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Gdf5 - Cre mice provide a general system that can be used to test the role of genes in articular regions .
label: B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: BMP receptor signaling is required not only for early development and creation of multiple tissues , but also for ongoing maintenance of articular cartilage after birth .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genetic variation in the strength of BMP receptor signaling may be an important risk factor in human osteoarthritis , and treatments that mimic or augment BMP receptor signaling should be investigated as a possible therapeutic strategy for maintaining the health of joint linings .
label: B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Thin layers of articular cartilage line the bones of synovial joints and provide a smooth , wear - resistant structure that reduces friction and absorbs impact forces ( Brandt et al . 1998 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Loss or damage to articular cartilage is a hallmark of arthritic diseases and is one of the most common reasons that both young and old adults seek medical care .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Millions of people are afflicted with arthritis , and it ultimately affects more than half of people over the age of 65 ( Badley 1995 ; Yelin and Callahan 1995 ) .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A better understanding of the molecular mechanisms that create and maintain articular cartilage is crucial for discovering the causes of joint disorders and providing useful medical treatments .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Joint formation begins during embryogenesis , when stripes of high cell density called interzones form across developing skeletal precursors ( Haines 1947 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Programmed cell death occurs within the interzone , and a three - layered interzone forms that has two layers of higher cell density flanking a region of lower cell density .
label: O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Non - joint precursors of the skeleton typically develop into cartilage , which hypertrophies and is replaced by bone .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , cells within the high - density layers of the interzone are excluded from this process and develop into the permanent layers of articular cartilage found in the mature joint ( Mitrovic 1978 ) .
label: O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Studies over the last 10 y have begun to elucidate some of the signaling pathways that contribute to the early stages of joint formation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Wnt14 is expressed in stripes at the sites where joints will form , and it is capable of inducing expression of other joint markers when misexpressed at new locations in the limb ( Hartmann and Tabin 2001 ) .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Several members of the bone morphogenetic protein ( BMP ) family of secreted signaling molecules are also expressed in stripes at sites where joints will form , including those encoded by the genes Gdf5 , Gdf6 , Gdf7 , Bmp2 , and Bmp4 ( Storm and Kingsley 1996 ; Wolfman et al . 1997 ; Francis - West et al . 1999 ; Settle et al . 2003 ) .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Of these , Gdf5 expression is most strikingly limited to regions where joints will develop and is one of the earliest known markers of joint formation .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Mutations in either Gdf5 or the closely related Gdf6 gene also block formation of joints at specific locations , providing strong evidence that these molecules are essential for the joint formation process ( Storm et al . 1994 ; Settle et al . 2003 ) .
label: B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , mutations in Bmp2 or Bmp4 cause early embryonic lethality , making it difficult to test their role in joint formation ( Winnier et al . 1995 ; Zhang and Bradley 1996 ) .
label: O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Much less is known about how signaling pathways function during the subsequent maturation and maintenance of adult joint structures .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Importantly , BMP signaling components are present in adult articular cartilage , suggesting that they may function during the late development or maintenance of this critical structure ( Erlacher et al . 1998 ; Chubinskaya et al . 2000 ; Muehleman et al . 2002 ; Bau et al . 2002 ; Bobacz et al . 2003 ) .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: BMPs bind tetrameric complexes of two type I and two type II transmembrane serine - threonine kinase receptors .
label: B-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-GO B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Upon BMP binding , these complexes transduce a signal by phosphorylating members of the Smad family of transcription factors ( Massague 1996 ) .
label: O B-GGP O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Recent experiments have implicated two different BMP type I receptors in skeletal patterning , BMPR1A and BMPR1B .

text_a: A Chemoattractant Role for NT - 3 in Proprioceptive Axon Guidance
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GO O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Neurotrophin - 3 ( NT - 3 ) is required for proprioceptive neuron survival .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Deletion of the proapoptotic gene Bax in NT - 3 knockout mice rescues these neurons and allows for examination of their axon growth in the absence of NT - 3 signaling .
label: B-SO O O O B-SO B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O B-CL O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O

text_a: TrkC - positive peripheral and central axons from dorsal root ganglia follow proper trajectories and arrive in close proximity to their targets but fail to innervate them .
label: B-GGP O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Peripherally , muscle spindles are absent and TrkC - positive axons do not enter their target muscles .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O O

text_a: Centrally , proprioceptive axons branch in ectopic regions of the spinal cord , even crossing the midline .
label: O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In vitro assays reveal chemoattractant effects of NT - 3 on dorsal root ganglion axons .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GO O

text_a: Our results show that survival factor NT - 3 acts as a short - distance axon guidance molecule for muscle sensory afferents as they approach their proper targets .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Neurotrophin - 3 ( NT - 3 ) is a key requirement for the development of proprioceptive inputs to motor neurons ( Chen and Frank 1999 ; Chen et al . 2003 ) .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice deficient in NT - 3 , its tyrosine kinase receptor , TrkC , or in TrkC - positive neuron - specific transcription factor Runx3 display severe ataxia associated with the absence of muscle spindles , and loss of proprioceptive neurons in dorsal root ganglia ( DRGs ) or their axons ( Ernfors et al . 1994 ; Klein et al . 1994 ; Tessarollo et al . 1994 ; Fari n as et al . 1996 ; Liebl et al . 1997 ; Inoue et al . 2002 ; Levanon et al . 2002 ) .
label: B-Taxon O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: NT - 3 is expressed in the ventral spinal cord , in the developing limb buds , and in intrafusal bag fibers of muscle spindles later in development ( Copray and Brouwer 1994 ; Fari n as et al . 1996 ; Tojo et al . 1996 ) .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: When sensory axons contact developing myotubes , they induce muscle spindle differentiation , forming ring - like spiral nerve endings around them .
label: O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O

text_a: In the chicken embryo , limb ablations or anti - NT - 3 antibody injections into limb buds lead to elimination of TrkC - positive neurons and decreased innervation of motor neurons ( Oakley et al . 1995 , 1997 ) .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-GO O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-CL O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Is NT - 3 only a chemotrophic survival factor for muscle sensory afferents , or does it have additional roles in the development of the proprioceptors and the establishment of the monosynaptic reflex arc ?
label: O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Here we provide evidence that NT - 3 acts as a chemoattractant for sensory axons during the final phase of their target - directed pathfinding .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: TrkC - Positive DRG Neurons Are Rescued in Bax / NT - 3 Double Knockout Mice
label: B-GGP O O O B-CL O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-Taxon

text_a: Mice lacking proapoptotic protein Bax allow for distinguishing survival effects of neurotrophins from other effects .
label: B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Bax - deficient sensory neurons no longer require neurotrophins for survival ( White et al . 1998 ; Patel et al . 2000 ) , thus they can be used to examine axonal effects .

text_a: DNA binding and helicase actions of mouse MCM4 / 6 / 7 helicase
label: B-SO O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Helicases play central roles in initiation and elongation of DNA replication .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: We previously reported that helicase and ATPase activities of the mammalian Mcm4 / 6 / 7 complex are activated specifically by thymine - rich single - stranded DNA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O

text_a: Here , we examined its substrate preference and helicase actions using various synthetic DNAs .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O

text_a: On a bubble substrate , Mcm4 / 6 / 7 makes symmetric dual contacts with the 5 ' - proximal 25 nt single - stranded segments adjacent to the branch points , presumably generating double hexamers .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Loss of thymine residues from one single - strand results in significant decrease of unwinding efficacy , suggesting that concurrent bidirectional unwinding by a single double hexameric Mcm4 / 6 / 7 may play a role in efficient unwinding of the bubble .
label: O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mcm4 / 6 / 7 binds and unwinds various fork and extension structures carrying a single - stranded 3 ' - tail DNA .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O

text_a: The extent of helicase activation depends on the sequence context of the 3 ' - tail , and the maximum level is achieved by DNA with 50 % or more thymine content .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Strand displacement by Mcm4 / 6 / 7 is inhibited , as the GC content of the duplex region increases .
label: B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O

text_a: Replacement of cytosine - guanine pairs with cytosine - inosine pairs in the duplex restored unwinding , suggesting that mammalian Mcm4 / 6 / 7 helicase has difficulties in unwinding stably base - paired duplex .
label: B-SO O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O

text_a: Taken together , these findings reveal important features on activation and substrate preference of the eukaryotic replicative helicase .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: INTRODUCTION
label: O

text_a: DNA helicases couple the hydrolysis of nucleotide or deoxynucleotide triphosphate to duplex unwinding ( 1 ) .
label: B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: Coordination of a set of subactivities including nucleotide binding , DNA binding and ATP hydrolysis is required for unwinding of duplex DNA ( 1 , 2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: The hexameric helicases , to which minichromosome maintenance ( Mcm ) helicase belongs , are known to assemble a ring - like structure ( 3 - 5 ) .
label: O O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Whereas most of DNA helicases of this group , including simian virus 40 large T - antigen ( 6 ) , Escherichia coli DnaB ( 7 ) and Archaeal Mcm ( 4 , 8 , 9 ) , are composed of a single subunit , the active eukaryotic Mcm helicases are composed of two trimeric Mcm4 / 6 / 7 proteins ( 10 - 14 ) .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-Taxon I-Taxon B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-GO I-GO O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: All the six Mcm 2 - 7 proteins contain highly conserved DNA - dependent ATPase motifs in their central regions ( 15 , 16 ) .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-CHEBI O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Among the several stable subcomplexes which MCM proteins can generate , only the Mcm4 / 6 / 7 complex has been shown to possess an intrinsic DNA helicase activity ( 10 - 14 , 17 - 18 ) .
label: O O O O O O B-GO B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While Mcm4 , Mcm6 and Mcm7 proteins make distinct contribution to its helicase activity ( 11 - 13 ) , Mcm2 or Mcm3 / 5 inhibit the helicase activity of the Mcm4 / 6 / 7 complex by converting its double trimer structure into a heterotetramer or heteropentamer , respectively ( 3 , 11 ) .
label: O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Chromatin immunoprecipitation assays and genetic characterization in Saccharomyces cerevisiae strongly suggested that Mcm is involved not only in initiation but also in the DNA chain elongation stage as a replicative helicase ( 19 , 20 ) .
label: B-GO O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon I-Taxon O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Consistent with this notion , the processivity of the Schizosaccharomyces pombe and mouse Mcm4 / 6 / 7 complexes is significantly stimulated on forked DNA structures and it can unwind duplex DNA of 400 - 500 bp ( 13 , 14 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GO O O O O B-GO B-SO O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Mcm4 / 6 / 7 binds to fork and bubble structures in an ATP - dependent manner , and generates a double - hexameric complex , as was shown for T - antigen ( 13 , 14 , 21 ) .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: Recently , we reported that the helicase and ATP hydrolysis activities of mammalian Mcm4 / 6 / 7 are specifically activated by single - stranded DNA containing stretches of thymine residues and proposed a novel model that Mcm may play a crucial role in selection of replication origins in higher eukaryotes ( 13 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-Taxon B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-SO O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: In this report , in order to clarify the mode of action of the Mcm helicase and obtain insight into how it may function at the replication forks in vivo , we have conducted detailed analyses of helicase action and DNA binding of mouse Mcm4 / 6 / 7 helicase using various forked and bubble substrate DNAs .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-SO O

text_a: We specifically addressed sequence requirement for the Mcm helicase activation , mode of interaction with DNA substrates and whether the thymine sequences are required for continuous activation of Mcm helicase during the unwinding process .
label: O O O B-SO O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O

text_a: The results indicate that mammalian Mcm4 / 6 / 7 primarily binds to single - stranded DNA region , and that the extent of helicase activation is related to the thymine content of the single - stranded segment .

text_a: Huntington ' s disease ( HD ) is a dominantly inherited neurodegenerative disorder that is caused by CAG repeats in the HD locus that extend a polyglutamine tract in a ubiquitous HEAT domain protein called huntingtin [ 1 ] .

text_a: However , polyglutamine expansions in unrelated proteins that target distinct neuronal cell populations cause distinct ' polyglutamine ' neurodegenerative disorders .

text_a: Nor can it be simply explained by delayed development , as stage - specific markers , such as Wnt3a and primordial germ cells , which are detectable at E7 . 0 in wild - type embryos , are induced appropriately .

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Congenital nephrogenic diabetes insipidus ( NDI ) is a disease characterized by failure of the kidney to concentrate urine in response to vasopressin .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Human kindreds with nephrogenic diabetes insipidus have been found to harbor mutations in the vasopressin receptor 2 ( Avpr2 ) gene or the vasopressin - sensitive water channel aquaporin - 2 ( Aqp2 ) gene .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O B-GGP O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O

text_a: Development of a treatment is rendered difficult due to the lack of a viable animal model .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Through forward genetic screening of ethylnitrosourea - mutagenized mice , we report the identification and characterization of a mouse model of NDI , with an F204V mutation in the Aqp2 gene .
label: O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: Unlike previously attempted murine models of NDI , our mice survive to adulthood and more exactly recapitulate the human disorder .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Previous in vitro experiments using renal cell lines suggest recessive Aqp2 mutations result in improper trafficking of the mutant water pore .
label: O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O B-SO B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Using these animals , we have directly proven this hypothesis of improper AQP2 translocation as the molecular defect in nephrogenic diabetes insipidus in the intact organism .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Additionally , using a renal cell line we show that the mutated protein , AQP2 - F204V , is retained in the endoplasmic reticulum and that this abnormal localization can be rescued by wild - type protein .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-SO B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-CHEBI O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Nephrogenic diabetes insipidus ( NDI ) is a disease marked by excessive urination and thirst .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Normally , the hypothalamus senses situations where water is limited and signals to the kidney to increase water reabsorption from urine .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: The signaling molecule secreted by the hypothalamus is arginine vasopressin ( AVP ) , which binds to a specific protein on the surface of kidney cells , AVP receptor ( AVPR2 ) .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O

text_a: AVP binding to its receptor on kidney cells begins a series of biochemical events that ultimately results in the insertion of a protein , aquaporin 2 ( AQP2 ) , into the outer surface of the kidney cell .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O

text_a: As its name suggests , AQP2 facilitates the reuptake of water from the urinary space into the cell , thus concentrating the urine and conserving water .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Congenital NDI is caused by mutations in either the water channel , AQP2 , or in the receptor , AVPR2 .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: While these mutations have been studied extensively in the lab , work in live animals has been very limited .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: This report describes the first viable mouse model of NDI .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Previous models have been attempted by targeted mutation , i . e . , genes known to be involved in the disease have been altered in the mouse , a so - called reverse genetic approach .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Reverse genetic approaches have so far failed to produce a viable mouse model of NDI .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Here the authors take a forward genetic approach in which genes are mutated at random and animals are screened for disease - like properties .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: As well as proving hypotheses that come from lab studies , this model opens the door to the testing of gene therapy or other therapies for treatment of NDI .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Nephrogenic diabetes insipidus ( NDI ) is a disease characterized by excessive urination and thirst , despite normal production of the antidiuretic hormone arginine vasopressin ( AVP ) [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: The inherited forms are either X - linked as a consequence of mutation of the Avpr2 gene [ 2 ] , or autosomal due to mutation of the Aqp2 gene [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-GO O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O

text_a: Aquaporin - 2 ( AQP2 ) is a pore - forming protein belonging to a family of water channels [ 4 ] , and it is expressed in collecting - duct principal cells in the kidney [ 5 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Generally these proteins permit the passage of water through the plasma membrane ( PM ) of cells , several of which carry out this role specifically in the process of water reabsorption from urine in the kidney .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GO I-GO O B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: It has been established that aquaporins , although functional as a monomer , tetramerize before their insertion into the plasma membrane [ 4 , 6 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore these proteins can also be differentially targeted to distinct regions of the PM ; for example , AQP2 is routed to the apical membrane of cells surrounding the collecting duct , whereas other aquaporins ( AQP3 or 4 ) are inserted into the basolateral face .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Unlike all other family members , AQP2 is not constitutively inserted into the plasma membrane .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: Under basal conditions , the protein resides in subapical intracellular vesicles ; however , under conditions requiring water retention AQP2 translocates to the apical membrane , permitting water reabsorption [ 7 , 8 ] .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GO B-GO O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP O O O B-GO I-GO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: For this process to occur , AVP binds its receptor , AVPR2 , on the basolateral face of the collecting duct cells , leading to a rise in intracellular cAMP , ultimately resulting in phosphorylation of AQP2 at serine 256 by cAMP - dependent protein kinase [ 9 ] and its redistribution to the plasma membrane .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-GO B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-GGP O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: The importance of AQP2 redistribution has been highlighted by functional characterization of Aqp2 mutations resulting in severe NDI in humans [ 3 , 10 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Recessive Aqp2 mutations are generally thought to produce an abnormally localized and , in most instances , misfolded water pore that responds abnormally to an increase in cAMP [ 6 , 11 ] .
label: O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , dominant mutations have been described and found to misroute both the mutant and the wild - type protein to the basolateral membrane [ 6 , 12 ] .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-CHEBI O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Several mouse models of diabetes insipidus have been generated [ 13 - 17 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In an attempt to recapitulate human NDI , mice have been generated with mutations in Aqp2 and Avpr2 [ 15 , 18 ] .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Yang and colleagues created a mouse with a T126M knock - in mutation in the Aqp2 gene .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: Unexpectedly , homozygous mutant mice died within 6 d after birth .
label: O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , AVPR2 - deficient male pups also die within the first week after birth .

text_a: Together these models suggest that the mouse may be a highly sensitive organism with regard to water homeostasis , and is unable to survive with polyuria .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In a forward genetic screen , a mouse with an Aqp2 mutation was identified .
label: O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP B-SO O O O

text_a: The purpose of this study was to characterize this murine model of recessive nephrogenic DI .

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: In a forward genetic screen that used ethylnitrosourea ( ENU ) to induce mutations in a founder animal whose offspring were then screened for abnormal whole body metabolism [ 19 , 20 ] , we found a family of mice that urinated and drank excessively .
label: O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The disorder in these mice segregated in a monogenic , autosomal recessive manner , making Aqp2 a candidate gene .

text_a: Sequencing of Aqp2 coding region of affected mice identified a thymine to guanine ( T to G ) transversion ( Figure 1A ) , which is predicted to lead to a valine for phenylalanine substitution at amino acid 204 of the protein ( F204V ) .
label: O O B-GGP B-SO I-SO O O B-Taxon O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI B-SO O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Genetic perturbations of alpha - amino - 3 - hydroxy - 5 - methyl - 4 - isoxazolepropionate receptors ( AMPARs ) are widely used to dissect molecular mechanisms of sensory coding , learning , and memory .
label: B-SO O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In this study , we investigated the role of Ca2 + - permeable AMPARs in olfactory behavior .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: AMPAR modification was obtained by depletion of the GluR - B subunit or expression of unedited GluR - B ( Q ) , both leading to increased Ca2 + permeability of AMPARs .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Mice with this functional AMPAR switch , specifically in forebrain , showed enhanced olfactory discrimination and more rapid learning in a go / no - go operant conditioning task .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Olfactory memory , however , was dramatically impaired .
label: O O O O O O O O O

text_a: GluR - B depletion in forebrain was ectopically variable ( mosaic ) among individuals and strongly correlated with decreased olfactory memory in hippocampus and cortex .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Accordingly , memory was rescued by transgenic GluR - B expression restricted to piriform cortex and hippocampus , while enhanced odor discrimination was independent of both GluR - B variability and transgenic GluR - B expression .
label: O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-SO B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O

text_a: Thus , correlated differences in behavior and levels of GluR - B expression allowed a mechanistic and spatial dissection of olfactory learning , discrimination , and memory capabilities .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: The sense of smell is of paramount importance for rodents [ 1 ] , for which rapid odor discrimination and long - lasting olfactory memory permits responses to predator and prey critical for survival .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Consequently , the behavioral analyses of olfactory capabilities in rodents are efficient , quantitative , and reproducible [ 2 - 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While in the formation and storage of olfactory memory piriform cortex [ 5 - 7 ] , hippocampus [ 8 , 9 ] , and olfactory bulb [ 10 - 12 ] are all implicated , the cellular correlates for these processes have not been clearly delineated .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The contribution of the hippocampus to olfactory memory is presently controversial [ 2 , 13 - 18 ] , but is deemed unlikely for simple olfactory discrimination tasks [ 9 , 19 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In fact , the most likely candidates for a cellular correlate of olfactory memory appear to be the neuronal connections in the piriform cortex due to the associational connectivity [ 5 ] and the expression of several forms of cellular and synaptic plasticity [ 7 , 20 - 23 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-GO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Concerning odor discrimination itself , cellular mechanisms for this process are often attributed to the inhibitory circuitry of the olfactory bulb ( [ 24 - 30 ] ; reviewed in [ 31 - 33 ] ) .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Lateral inhibitory circuits were postulated , in analogy to retina [ 34 , 35 ] , to mediate contrast enhancement [ 24 ] , for which physiological recordings [ 24 , 36 , 37 ] and modeling data , based on the well - known anatomy [ 29 ] , provide additional support .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Such contrast enhancement may rest in large part on the particular properties of dendrodendritic synapses between the principal output neurons ( mitral cells ) and local inhibitory neurons ( granule cells ) of the olfactory bulb .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O B-CL O O O O B-CL O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: In these distinct synapses , lateral and recurrent inhibition mediated by the gamma - aminobutyric acid - A system may be controlled by the activity of the closely appositioned glutamatergic part , perhaps triggering increased gamma - aminobutyric acid release by Ca2 + influx through glutamate - gated receptor channels ( [ 38 ] ; see also [ 39 ] ) .
label: O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Given that neuronal circuits underlying odor discrimination , as well as olfactory memory , rely on properties of fast excitatory neurotransmission mediated by alpha - amino - 3 - hydroxy - 5 - methyl - 4 - isoxazolepropionate receptors ( AMPARs ) , we sought to alter , by genetic means , the specific functional contribution of alpha - amino - 3 - hydroxy - 5 - methyl - 4 - isoxazolepropionate ( AMPA ) channels containing the dominant subunit GluR - B .
label: O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: Of the four AMPAR constituents , GluR - A to D ( GluR1 to 4 ) , which form tetrameric channels with different binary subunit combinations , GluR - B is contained in the majority of AMPARs .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O

text_a: GluR - B is critically involved in the formation and trafficking of AMPARs , and dominates their ion conductance and gating properties [ 40 - 46 ] .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Notably , the normally low Ca2 + permeability of AMPA channels in principal neurons is solely mediated by GluR - B , due to a unique arginine residue ( R587 ) in the functionally critical glutamine / arginine ( Q / R ) site of the pore - forming segment M2 [ 44 , 47 , 48 ] , resulting from RNA editing of GluR - B pre - mRNA ( [ 49 ] ; reviewed in [ 50 ] ) .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Hence , either GluR - B deficiency , or the expression of Q / R site - unedited GluR - B with a glutamine residue at the critical channel site , leads to increased Ca2 + permeability of AMPA channels , as amply demonstrated in gene - targeted mice [ 51 , 53 , 58 , 60 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O B-SO O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , the absence of GluR - B , or the expression of GluR - B ( Q ) in the olfactory bulb , may generate increased inhibition in mitral cells .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O

text_a: Moreover , the ablation of GluR - B , but also changes in the extent of Q / R site editing of GluR - B , can alter the strength of excitatory synaptic transmission in the genetically addressed neuronal populations [ 51 , 58 , 60 ] , thus potentially shifting the balance of excitatory and inhibitory transmission in the affected circuits .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O B-SO O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Similarly , changes in synaptic plasticity due to Ca2 + - permeable AMPARs [ 51 , 52 , 60 ] , e . g . , in piriform cortex , might alter odor memorization processes .
label: O O O O B-GO O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , alterations of AMPAR properties in these brain regions will allow investigation and possibly separation of mechanisms underlying these behavioral traits .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Concerning this intended switch in AMPAR properties , mice lacking all GluR - B , however , show a widespread impairment in behavior , including lethargy , motor coordination problems , and deficits in exploratory activity [ 51 ] , which preclude detailed behavioral analyses .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Similarly , mice expressing ( in the entire brain ) a substantial part of the GluR - B population in the Q / R site - unedited form become seizure - prone and die prematurely [ 53 ] .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Some of these problems can be partially overcome by use of spatially and temporally restricted expression systems [ 54 - 56 ] , in particular the Cre - lox system , with Cre - recombinase expression in defined brain areas of gene - targeted mice carrying GluR - B alleles marked by loxP sites for Cre - mediated recombination [ 55 , 57 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , restricting the expression of Q / R site - unedited GluR - B to forebrain resulted in almost normal lifespan and an only weakly seizure - prone phenotype [ 58 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice with forebrain - specific GluR - B depletion appeared almost completely normal throughout life with no developmental abnormalities , thus permitting a detailed , quantitative investigation of olfactory behavior .
label: B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To allow for the mechanistic separation of olfactory learning , discrimination , and memory , we exploited a well - known phenomenon of transgenes , which concerns heterogeneous expression among different founder lines and even among genetically identical individuals of a given line .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: This opens one of eight odor valves , and a diversion valve that diverts all air flow away from the animal for typically 500 ms .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: After the release of the diversion valve , the odor is accessible to the animal for 2 , 000 ms .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: If it continuously licks at the lick port during this time ( once in at least three out of four 500 - ms bins ) , it can receive a 2 - to 4 - mu l water reward after the end of the 2 , 000 - ms period .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: If the animal does not continuously lick , or if the presented odor was a designated nonrewarded odor , neither a reward is given nor any sort of punishment , to minimize stress for the animal .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Trials are counted as correct if the animal licks continuously upon presentation of a rewarded odor or does not lick continuously with a nonrewarded odor .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A second trial cannot be initiated unless an intertrial interval of at least 5 s has passed .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This interval is sufficiently long so that animals typically retract quickly after the end of the trial .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Odors are presented in a pseudo - randomized scheme ( no more than two successive presentations of the same odor , equal numbers within each 20 - trial block ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: No intrinsic preference toward any of the odors was observed but controlled for by counterbalancing .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A total of 100 - 300 trials were performed each day , separated into 30 - to 40 - min stretches to ensure maximal motivation despite the mild water restriction scheme .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O

text_a: Additionally , motivation was controlled by monitoring intertrial intervals and the response frequency [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Measurement of performance
label: O O O

text_a: The simplest measure of performance is the fraction of trials in which the animal responds correctly -- that is , responds with licking to the presentation of the S + odor and does not lick with presentation of the S - odor .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It was shown previously , however , that the detailed sampling pattern is a more sensitive measure of discrimination performance [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To avoid long ( > 3 - week ) training periods , we chose not to measure discrimination times [ 3 ] but to analyze the average sampling behavior in total .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Upon presentation of a rewarded odor , the animal usually continuously breaks the beam , whereas upon presentation of an unrewarded odor the head is quickly retracted .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The difference in response to the rewarded and unrewarded odor is approximately sigmoidal ( Figures 1D , 1E , and 2D ) and yields a sensitive measure of the discrimination performance .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: From this difference or from a sigmoidal fit to the difference ( Figure 1E ) , several measures of discrimination can be determined : the average difference , peak , or maximum , time of half maximum , and slope of the fitted sigmoid .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Whereas for small trial numbers ( < 200 ) the slope often is not well constrained , any of the other parameters yielded essentially the same results .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The discrimination index plotted in Figures 1F , 2C , 4D , and 6C refers to the fitted maximum , generally ranging from zero to one , one indicating the best discrimination .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Identical results were obtained with other measures of discrimination , such as the average sampling difference .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Structure of training
label: O O O

text_a: After habituation , mice were trained to discriminate 1 % amylacetate from 1 % ethylbutyrate for 500 trials .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: During the last 100 trials , the S + odor was rewarded in only 50 % of the cases to increase the resistance to extinction of the acquired memory .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These trials were excluded for the statistical analysis of the learning curves .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Inclusion did not alter the result of the ANOVA ; however , linear fitting of the learning curve was not appropriate anymore as partial saturation of learning performance had already occurred .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Subsequently , animals were trained for 500 trials on the difficult discrimination task [ 3 ] between the binary mixtures 0 . 6 % eugenol / 0 . 4 % cineol and 0 . 4 % eugenol / 0 . 6 % cineol .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: To allow comparison , the last 100 trials were altered as for the simple discrimination task above .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: After two days of rest , animals were finally trained on the simple discrimination task between 1 % pelargonic acid and 1 % valeric acid for another 600 trials .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: In all experiments , counterbalancing between both odors and setups was ensured within and between genetic groups , or results were compared with counterbalanced subgroups , which in every case yielded identical results .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: During the entire course of the experiment , the person handling the animals and operating the olfactometers was blind to the genotype of the mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Memory measurement
label: O O

text_a: To assess memory , after 280 trials of training to discriminate between pelargonic acid and valeric acid , memory trials were interleaved for 120 trials ; that is , within each block of 20 trials two unrewarded amylacetate and two unrewarded ethylbutyrate trials were included .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Memory scores are given as the fraction of those unrewarded trials that were responded to correctly ( licking response to the odor that was rewarded in the initial training session [ S + ] , no response to the odor that was not rewarded initially [ S - ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Due to the epileptic phenotype and the slightly increased mortality [ 58 ] , GluRB Delta ECS : FB mice were trained only for the initial period of 400 trials .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Statistics
label: O

label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Two major branches of anti - cadmium defense in the mouse : MTF - 1 / metallothioneins and glutathione
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-Taxon O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-CHEBI

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Metal - responsive transcription factor 1 ( MTF - 1 ) regulates expression of its target genes in response to various stress conditions , notably heavy metal load , via binding to metal response elements ( MREs ) in the respective enhancer / promoter regions .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O

text_a: Furthermore , it serves a vital function in embryonic liver development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , targeted deletion of Mtf1 in the liver after birth is no longer lethal .
label: O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For this study , Mtf1 conditional knockout mice and control littermates were both mock - or cadmium - treated and liver - specific transcription was analyzed .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Besides the well - characterized metallothionein genes , several new MTF - 1 target genes with MRE motifs in the promoter region emerged .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O

text_a: MTF - 1 is required for the basal expression of selenoprotein W , muscle 1 gene ( Sepw1 ) that encodes a glutathione - binding and putative antioxidant protein , supporting a role of MTF - 1 in the oxidative stress response .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-GGP O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , MTF - 1 mediates the cadmium - induced expression of N - myc downstream regulated gene 1 ( Ndrg1 ) , which is induced by several stress conditions and is overexpressed in many cancers .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: MTF - 1 is also involved in the cadmium response of cysteine - and glycine - rich protein 1 gene ( Csrp1 ) , which is implicated in cytoskeletal organization .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: In contrast , MTF - 1 represses the basal expression of Slc39a10 , a putative zinc transporter .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: In a pathway independent of MTF - 1 , cadmium also induced the transcription of genes involved in the synthesis and regeneration of glutathione , a cadmium - binding antioxidant .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: These data provide strong evidence for two major branches of cellular anti - cadmium defense , one via MTF - 1 and its target genes , notably metallothioneins , the other via glutathione , with an apparent overlap in selenoprotein W .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: INTRODUCTION
label: O

text_a: All organisms have evolved mechanisms to cope with a variety of stress situations .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: One type of stress response is triggered by heavy metals , such as zinc , copper and cadmium ( for convenience , the terms zinc , copper and cadmium are also used here to denote Zn2 + , Cu2 + and Cd2 + , respectively ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Metallothioneins ( MTs ) , small , cysteine - rich proteins , play an important role in metal homeostasis and detoxification due to their ability to bind different heavy metal ions ( 1 - 3 ) .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: In the mouse , there are four metallothionein genes , designated as Mt1 to Mt4 .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: Basal , as well as heavy metal - induced , expression of Mt1 and Mt2 is mediated by metal - responsive transcription factor 1 ( MTF - 1 ) ( 4 - 7 ) .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: This zinc finger protein recognizes short cis - acting DNA sequences , termed metal response elements ( MREs ; core consensus sequence TGCRCNC ) , which are present in the promoters of target genes ( 8 , 9 ) .
label: O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: MTF - 1 is conserved in evolution , and homologs have been characterized in the mouse ( 10 ) , humans ( 11 ) , Drosophila ( 12 - 14 ) and fish ( 15 , 16 ) .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: The role of MTF - 1 has been studied most extensively in the mouse .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Besides coping with heavy metal load , MTF - 1 can also mediate the induction of Mt genes in response to other stress situations , such as oxidative stress ( 5 , 17 ) and hypoxia ( 18 ) .
label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , it is required for the metalloregulation of Znt1 , encoding the major plasma membrane - localized zinc efflux transporter ( 19 ) , the hypoxic / anoxic induction of the gene for placental growth factor ( Plgf ) , an angiogenic protein of the vascular endothelial growth factor ( VEGF ) family ( 20 ) , and has recently been invoked in tumor development ( 21 , 22 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO I-GO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , MTF - 1 has an essential function during embryogenesis : targeted disruption of Mtf1 results in embryonic lethality around 14 days post coitum due to hepatocyte necrosis ( 23 ) .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: In contrast , mice with nan mutations for the stress - inducible metallothionein genes ( Mt1 and Mt2 ) are viable , though sensitive to cadmium ( 24 , 25 ) , indicating that additional important MTF - 1 target genes are involved in the lethal phenotype .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: With the Cre - loxP conditional knockout technique , it is possible to circumvent the embryonic lethal phenotype of conventional Mtf1 knockout mice .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O

text_a: Previous experiments with this technique revealed that deletion of Mtf1 from the liver after birth is no longer lethal under non - stress conditions ( 26 ) .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: For this study , an inducible , liver - specific Mtf1 knockout mouse line was generated to perform a search for MTF - 1 target genes and cadmium - inducible genes in the adult liver .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: A number of target gene candidates emerged upon a transcriptome analysis of mock - and cadmium - treated Mtf1 conditional knockout mice and control littermates and several of these were confirmed by semiquantitative RT - PCR .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Besides the stress - inducible metallothionein genes that were already known as target genes of MTF - 1 , we find that MTF - 1 is important for basal liver expression of the gene for selenoprotein W , muscle 1 ( Sepw1 ) as well as for cadmium - induced expression of N - myc downstream regulated gene 1 ( Ndrg1 ) and the gene encoding cysteine - and glycine - rich protein 1 ( Csrp1 ) .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O

text_a: In addition , MTF - 1 appears to repress the expression of solute carrier family 39 , member 10 gene ( Slc39a10 ) , which encodes a putative metal ion transporter .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O

text_a: In an MTF - 1 - independent transcriptome response , several genes involved in glutathione metabolism are induced .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Further studies confirmed a dual anti - cadmium defense , one via glutathione and another one via MTF - 1 and its target genes , including metallothioneins .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O
