text_a: CEBPG transcription factor correlates with antioxidant and DNA repair genes in normal bronchial epithelial cells but not in individuals with bronchogenic carcinoma
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Cigarette smoking is the primary cause of bronchogenic carcinoma ( BC ) , yet only 10 - 15 % of heavy smokers develop BC and it is likely that this variation in risk is , in part , genetically determined .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: We previously reported a set of antioxidant genes for which transcript abundance was lower in normal bronchial epithelial cells ( NBEC ) of BC individuals compared to non - BC individuals .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: In unpublished studies of the same NBEC samples , transcript abundance values for several DNA repair genes were correlated with these antioxidant genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O

text_a: From these data , we hypothesized that antioxidant and DNA repair genes are co - regulated by one or more transcription factors and that inter - individual variation in expression and / or function of one or more of these transcription factors is responsible for inter - individual variation in risk for BC .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Methods
label: O

text_a: The putative transcription factor recognition sites common to six of the antioxidant genes were identified through in silico DNA sequence analysis .
label: O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O

text_a: The transcript abundance values of these transcription factors ( n = 6 ) and an expanded group of antioxidant and DNA repair genes ( n = 16 ) were measured simultaneously by quantitative PCR in NBEC of 24 non - BC and 25 BC individuals .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: CEBPG transcription factor was significantly ( p < 0 . 01 ) correlated with eight of the antioxidant or DNA repair genes in non - BC individuals but not in BC individuals .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: In BC individuals the correlation with CEBPG was significantly ( p < 0 . 01 ) lower than that of non - BC individuals for four of the genes ( XRCC1 , ERCC5 , GSTP1 , and SOD1 ) and the difference was nearly significant for GPX1 .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: The only other transcription factor correlated with any of these five target genes in non - BC individuals was E2F1 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O B-GGP O

text_a: E2F1 was correlated with GSTP1 among non - BC individuals , but in contrast to CEBPG , there was no significant difference in this correlation in non - BC individuals compared to BC individuals .
label: B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: We conclude that CEBPG is the transcription factor primarily responsible for regulating transcription of key antioxidant and DNA repair genes in non - BC individuals .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Further , we conclude that the heavy smokers selected for development of BC are those who have sub - optimal regulation of antioxidant and DNA repair genes by CEBPG .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O B-GGP O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: BC is currently the leading cause of cancer - related death in the United States , causing 28 % of all cancer deaths [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although cigarette smoking is the primary risk factor , only 10 - 15 % of heavy smokers ( greater than 20 pack years ) develop BC [ 1 - 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Antioxidant and DNA repair enzymes that provide protection from the effects of cigarette smoke are expressed in the progenitor cells for BC , normal bronchial epithelial cells ( NBEC ) [ 1 ] .
label: B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Inherited inter - individual variation in the function of these genes plays a role in determining risk for BC [ 4 - 6 ] .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Antioxidant enzymes protect NBEC from reactive oxygen species produced by interaction with and metabolism of xenobiotics such as pollution and cigarette smoke [ 4 - 7 ] as well as those produced by normal cellular metabolism .
label: B-CHEBI B-SO O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Reactive oxygen species cause many damaging reactions including denaturation of proteins , cross - linking of lipids and proteins and modification of nucleic acid bases , which can lead to cancer [ 7 ] .
label: B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: DNA repair enzymes repair the frequent damage to DNA caused by oxidant stress as well as other stresses , including bulky adducts derived from carcinogens in cigarette smoke [ 8 ] .
label: B-SO O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We previously reported that an interactive transcript abundance index comprising antioxidant genes was lower in NBEC of BC individuals compared to non - BC individuals , suggesting that BC individuals are selected on the basis of poor antioxidant protection [ 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O

text_a: In that study , there was a tendency towards correlation in transcript abundance between several pairs of antioxidant or DNA repair genes in non - BC individuals , but not in BC individuals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Gene pairs included in that observation were GSTP1 / GPX1 , CAT / GPX3 , and GPX3 / SOD1 .
label: B-SO O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: Correlation is one typical characteristic of co - regulated genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Another is shared transcription factor recognition sites in the regulatory regions of those genes [ 10 ] .
label: O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-SO I-SO O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Based on the above findings , it was hypothesized first , that there is inter - individual variation in regulation of key antioxidant and DNA repair genes by one or more transcription factors and second , that individuals with sub - optimal regulation are selected for development of BC if they smoke cigarettes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To test these hypotheses , transcription factor recognition sites common to the regulatory regions of the above correlated gene pairs were identified through in silico DNA sequence analysis , and their transcript abundance measured simultaneously with an expanded group of ten antioxidant and six DNA repair genes .
label: O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-SO O B-SO O

text_a: ( Toledo , OH ) .

text_a: Including an internal standard within a SMIS in each measurement controls for all known sources of variation during PCR , including inhibitors in samples , and generates virtually - multiplexed transcript abundance data that are directly comparable across multiple experiments and institutions [ 13 ] .

text_a: With respect to these studies , the key property of a quantitative PCR method is not whether the PCR products are measured kinetically or at endpoint , but rather whether there are internal standards in each measurement or not .

text_a: With respect to the genes measured in this study , for each gene the StaRT - PCR reagents had lower detection threshold of less than 10 molecules , linear dynamic range of more than six orders of magnitude ( less than 10 to over 107 molecules ) , and signal - to - analyte response of 100 % .

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: In this study , we tested two hypotheses .
label: O O O O O O O O O

text_a: First , that there is inter - individual variation in regulation of key antioxidant and DNA repair genes by one or more transcription factors .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Second , that individuals with sub - optimal regulation are selected for development of BC if they smoke cigarettes .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These hypotheses are supported by the findings that a ) there was large inter - individual variation in transcript levels of CEBPG and each of the target genes and in non - BC individuals , b ) CEBPG transcript abundance values were significantly correlated by bivariate analysis with the transcript abundance values of four key antioxidant and DNA repair genes in non - BC individuals , and c ) that there was no correlation between CEBPG and these genes in BC individuals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O B-Taxon O

text_a: These results support the hypothesis that each of the antioxidant or DNA repair genes correlated with CEBPG in non - BC individuals is regulated by CEBPG .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O

text_a: This is supported by the specificity of the CEBPG correlation .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O

text_a: That is , there was lack of correlation between any of the other five transcription factors assessed and these target genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Of particular note is the lack of correlation of the target genes with CEBPB , which binds to the same recognition site as CEBPG , and shares its recognition site within each of the antioxidant or DNA repair genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O B-GGP O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O

text_a: However , there are alternative explanations for the observed correlation of CEBPG with antioxidant and DNA repair genes in non - BC individuals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: One possibility is that CEBPG and each of the correlated antioxidant or DNA repair genes is regulated by a transcription factor that is as yet undiscovered , and / or has a recognition site that is not yet known and was not in the Genomatix software database .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: There also is more than one possible explanation for the observed lack of correlation between CEBPG and antioxidant or DNA repair genes in BC individuals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O B-Taxon O

text_a: For example , the non - BC individual and BC individual groups are not perfectly matched with respect to age , gender or smoking history ( Table 1 ) and each of these factors could contribute to the observed difference in correlation between groups .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the lack of association of transcript abundance level for CEBPG , XRCC1 , ERCC5 , GSTP1 , SOD1 , or GPX1 with age , gender or smoking history argues against such an explanation .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: One way to examine this possibility is through additional , larger , more closely matched studies .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Another possible explanation is that any differences in NBEC from BC individuals compared to non - BC individuals resulted from development of BC , instead of being a hereditary cause of increased risk for cancer .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The best way to determine this will be to conduct a prospective study .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In such a study , individuals matched for smoking history will be monitored for development of BC over time .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The correlation of transcript abundance values for CEBPG relative to transcript abundance values for each of the antioxidant or DNA repair genes will be assessed .
label: O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O

text_a: It is expected that the greatest incidence of BC will be among the heaviest smokers .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Among the matched heaviest smokers , it is expected that CEBPG will be significantly correlated with each of the antioxidant or DNA repair genes among the non - BC individuals but not correlated in BC individuals .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Thus , there are multiple possible explanations for the observed findings .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , based on the preponderance of data thus far available , we conclude that CEBPG is responsible for optimal transcriptional regulation of key antioxidant or DNA repair genes in NBEC and that there is inter - individual variation in the regulation of each of these genes by CEBPG .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O

text_a: If this conclusion is correct , the individuals at greatest risk for BC will be those with the most extreme smoking history combined with sub - optimal regulation of the largest number of antioxidant and DNA repair genes .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O

text_a: This , in turn , leads to increased representation among BC individuals of individuals with lack of correlation between CEBPG and each of the affected antioxidant and / or DNA repair genes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO O B-SO O

text_a: CEBPG is a truncated CEBP transcription factor [ 19 ] and possesses the sequences necessary for DNA binding and heterodimer formation , but lacks the sequences necessary for transactivation [ 20 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: CEBPG forms heterodimers with other CEBP family members and in other tissues this leads to increased [ 21 ] or decreased [ 20 ] transcription of the regulated gene .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: CEBPG is known to have stimulatory effect on the IL - 6 and IL - 8 promoters in B cell lines [ 21 ] , and can also act as a dominant negative regulator of CEBPA and CEBPB in fibroblast and B cell lines [ 20 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-CL O B-CL I-CL O O O O O

text_a: The data from CEBPG knockout mice support a role for CEBPG in protecting lungs from oxidant damage .
label: O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: CEBPG - / - knockout mice are healthy at birth but begin to die within 24 hours , and histological examination reveals emphysematous lungs [ 22 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In humans , risk for emphysema is associated with antioxidant capacity [ 23 ] , and there is a strong correlation between risk for emphysema and risk for BC .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , it will be important to obtain direct experimental evidence in NBECs for the role of CEBPG in regulating the antioxidant and DNA repair genes included in this study .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Correlation between CEBPG and target gene transcript levels may not be associated with correlation at the protein level .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: In this study , E2F1 correlation with DNA repair and antioxidant genes was less than the correlation observed with CEBPG , and the E2F1 correlation was observed in both non - BC individuals as well as BC individuals .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: The maintained correlation of E2F1 with DNA repair and antioxidant genes in BC individuals suggests that this function is more tightly controlled in the population and does not play a role in determination of risk for BC .
label: O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O O B-CHEBI B-SO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: E2F1 has previously been reported to regulate transcription of DNA repair enzyme genes in other cell types , including primary human fibroblasts and mouse epidermal cells [ 24 , 25 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO B-SO O O B-CL O O O O B-Taxon B-CL O B-Taxon B-CL I-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Clearly this would have survival value since DNA repair gene up - regulation in response to E2F1 provides additional DNA repair when the DNA is replicating and is particularly vulnerable to damage .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Epidemiologic assessment of the correlation between a particular variation in DNA sequence , or polymorphism , and risk for BC has been a dominant paradigm for many years .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus far , these efforts have met with scant success [ 26 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A common limitation in design of such studies is that they involve assessment of a single polymorphism or occasionally , a few polymorphisms .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Further , although the polymorphism assessed typically resides within a gene known to protect bronchial epithelium from carcinogens , oxidants , or DNA damage , the selection of the particular polymorphism for study is largely empiric , and not based on known functional properties .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These are problems because multiple infrequent polymorphisms at different sites may all contribute to risk and unless the key polymorphisms can be identified through a functional test , a statistically valid assessment would require much larger study populations [ 27 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The findings of this study support a novel approach to identifying clinically useful biomarkers .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: According to the paradigm used in this study , a ) a normal phenotype results from regulated transcription of a group of genes by one or more transcription factors , b ) the corresponding risk - conferring or disease phenotype results from sub - optimal interaction among those same genes , and c ) each phenotype is identifiable and distinguishable through virtually - multiplexed transcript abundance analysis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: The data presented here support the utility of this paradigm in identifying genes associated with risk for BC .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: The next step will be to identify polymorphisms that affect regulation of XRCC1 , ERCC5 , GSTP1 , SOD1 , and GPX1 by CEBPG .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: Such polymorphisms should yield biomarkers suitable for more readily accessible samples , such as peripheral blood or buccal smears .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A biomarker combining polymorphisms that affect regulation with those that affect function of antioxidant and DNA repair genes is likely to be the most accurate for identifying individuals at risk for BC .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: Biomarkers that accurately identify individuals at risk for BC will improve efficacy of chemoprevention and early detection clinical trials .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The observed inter - sample variation in the presence of gene - specific inhibitors of PCR provides evidence supporting the need for inclusion of an internal standard in each quantitative PCR transcript abundance measurement .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Including such internal standards in the form of standardized mixtures of internal standards improves the reproducibility of transcript abundance measurement and enables development of a standardized database comprising virtually - multiplexed transcript abundance data .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Virtually - multiplexed transcript abundance data are highly suited to identification of genes that have correlated transcript abundance values .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Correlation at the transcript abundance level is an important property of genes that are co - regulated at the transcription level .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: We conclude that in non - BC individuals , CEBPG regulates transcription of key antioxidant or DNA repair genes in NBEC and that in smokers who develop BC , CEBPG regulation is sub - optimal for a sufficient number of antioxidant and / or DNA repair genes to cause increased risk .

text_a: Persistent Amyloidosis following Suppression of A beta Production in a Transgenic Model of Alzheimer Disease
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The proteases ( secretases ) that cleave amyloid - beta ( A beta ) peptide from the amyloid precursor protein ( APP ) have been the focus of considerable investigation in the development of treatments for Alzheimer disease .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The prediction has been that reducing A beta production in the brain , even after the onset of clinical symptoms and the development of associated pathology , will facilitate the repair of damaged tissue and removal of amyloid lesions .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , no long - term studies using animal models of amyloid pathology have yet been performed to test this hypothesis .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Methods and Findings
label: O O O

text_a: We have generated a transgenic mouse model that genetically mimics the arrest of A beta production expected from treatment with secretase inhibitors .
label: O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: These mice overexpress mutant APP from a vector that can be regulated by doxycycline .
label: O B-Taxon O B-SO B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Under normal conditions , high - level expression of APP quickly induces fulminant amyloid pathology .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: We show that doxycycline administration inhibits transgenic APP expression by greater than 95 % and reduces A beta production to levels found in nontransgenic mice .
label: O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Suppression of transgenic A beta synthesis in this model abruptly halts the progression of amyloid pathology .
label: O O B-SO B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , formation and disaggregation of amyloid deposits appear to be in disequilibrium as the plaques require far longer to disperse than to assemble .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mice in which APP synthesis was suppressed for as long as 6 mo after the formation of A beta deposits retain a considerable amyloid load , with little sign of active clearance .
label: B-Taxon O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: This study demonstrates that amyloid lesions in transgenic mice are highly stable structures in vivo that are slow to disaggregate .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Our findings suggest that arresting A beta production in patients with Alzheimer disease should halt the progression of pathology , but that early treatment may be imperative , as it appears that amyloid deposits , once formed , will require additional intervention to clear .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Over a decade ago the amyloid cascade hypothesis predicted that increased levels of amyloid - beta ( A beta ) peptide lead to secondary pathologies that ultimately culminate in the onset of Alzheimer disease ( AD ) [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Early support for this hypothesis came from genetic studies linking early - onset AD to mutations in the amyloid precursor protein ( APP ) , from which A beta is derived , and presenilins 1 and 2 , which are interchangeable components of a endoprotease complex that releases A beta from APP ( for review see [ 2 , 3 ] ) .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: If , as predicted , overproduction of A beta initiates the cascade of events leading to disease , then therapeutic strategies that lower A beta levels should either arrest or reverse the progression from peptide to dementia .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Early evidence from clinical trials of antibody - mediated clearance , one of the first A beta - lowering approaches tested in humans , suggested that treatments designed to reduce amyloid burden may indeed be beneficial .
label: O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although the trials were halted because of adverse effects in a subset of volunteers [ 4 , 5 ] , further analysis of several patients found evidence that amyloid pathology , and to a lesser degree cognitive function , was improved in proportion to the patient ' s titer of A beta - specific antibody [ 6 , 7 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: While this approach is promising , constant exposure to antibodies that recognize an epitope highly enriched in the brain may have unexpected side effects that will limit its long - term use .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: An alternative approach that is being actively pursued for future treatment of AD seeks to lower A beta levels by limiting its production from the precursor protein APP .

label: O O O O O O B-GGP B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: At present , because of unexpected noncognitive behavioral abnormalities , it is not clear whether the tet - off APP mice can be used to address the same question in the context of amyloid pathology .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Both lines of tTA / APP mice we studied here display extreme hyperactivity visible as cage circling and quantified by activity monitoring ( see Figure 7 ) .
label: O O O O O B-GGP B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Many of the double transgenic mice showed similar circular patterns of swimming near the edge of the tank when tested in the Morris water maze .
label: O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: Expression of this phenotype makes standard tests of learning and memory uninterpretable .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Hyperactivity nonspecifically inhibits choice - driven changes in movement , the key element behind all cognitive behavioral paradigms .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We are currently working to determine whether hyperactivity correlates with expression of the APPswe / ind holoprotein or its proteolytic derivatives .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Preliminary studies suggest that hyperactivity does not appear quickly when dox - reared mice are shifted to nonmedicated diets ( J . L . J . , unpublished data ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These data may indicate that the neuroactive culprit is not immediately present after transgenic APP synthesis is initiated , but requires additional time to develop .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Alternatively , hyperactivity may be caused by neuronal alterations due to transgene expression during early postnatal development .
label: O O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Further experiments are needed to distinguish between these possibilities .
label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In summary , we demonstrate that abrogating A beta production halts the progression of pathologic changes in a transgenic mouse model of Alzheimer - type amyloidosis .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: However , despite dramatic reductions in A beta synthesis , neuritic plaques are stable structures in vivo that do not quickly disaggregate .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is possible that a combination of therapies to limit A beta production , increase A beta degradation , and enhance phagocytosis of deposited amyloid may be required to reverse damage associated with AD .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , if started early enough in the course of disease , secretase inhibitors alone could provide substantial benefit in slowing pathogenic processes linked to amyloid deposition .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Even at later stages in the disease , the presence of substantial microglial activation in human AD [ 40 ] suggests that simply slowing the formation of new amyloid deposits may allow ongoing phagocytosis to diminish preexisting lesions .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the development of safe and effective secretase inhibitors will ultimately be required to determine whether the human brain has the capacity to repair amyloid - associated damage of AD once the progression of pathology is arrested .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Patient Summary
label: O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Patients with Alzheimer disease ( AD ) have elevated levels of a small protein called amyloid - beta peptide that sticks together to form what are known as amyloid plaques in their brains .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This peptide is normally made at low levels in healthy individuals , and is made when a larger protein called amyloid precursor protein ( APP ) is cut down in size .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: New treatments are now being developed that will decrease the amount of A beta produced from APP .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-GGP O

text_a: However , it is not clear whether lowering the production of A beta will allow the brain to heal itself by clearing the amyloid plaques .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The answer to this question may be important for deciding when A beta - lowering drugs should be started , and may also determine how effective they are in reversing the mental symptoms of AD .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: What Did the Researchers Do and Find ?
label: O O O O O O O O

text_a: Because new drugs designed to lower A beta levels are still in development , they are not available for testing in animal models of the disease .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: Instead , basic questions about the effectiveness of this type of treatment must be answered using systems that mimic how the drugs work .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: To do this , the authors created mice that produce too much APP and that develop the same amyloid lesions as do human patients with AD .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Unlike normal mice , these mice also carried a switch gene that allowed the researchers to turn off APP by feeding the mice special food .
label: O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Turning off APP in these mice had the same effect as treating them with A beta - lowering drugs , and so the researchers were able to ask what happened to the amyloid plaques after A beta production was shut down .
label: O O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O

text_a: They showed that lowering A beta production prevents the amyloid lesions from getting worse as the disease progresses .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This means that treatment with A beta - lowering drugs may be able to stop the disease from filling the brain with plaques .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the researchers also found that the amyloid lesions that had formed before treatment was started remained intact throughout the experiment .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: What Do These Findings Mean ?
label: O O O O O O

text_a: These results indicate that treatments designed to lower the production of A beta may be an important part of future AD treatment , as this approach seems to prevents additional amyloid plaques from forming in the mouse brain .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: However , by itself , this strategy may not be able to rid the brain of plaques that have already formed in the brain before treatment is started .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The findings suggest that early treatment may be important for this approach to succeed .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Females and males share nearly identical genetic information , but vary widely with respect to disease susceptibility [ 1 , 2 ] .

text_a: Apart from the obvious gender - specific diseases such as cervical or prostate cancer , sex influences susceptibility to nearly all highly prevalent diseases that affect both women and men , including atherosclerosis and diabetes and their precursor conditions of hyperlipidemia , obesity , and insulin resistance .

text_a: The genetic component is multigenic , with the heritability embedded in the genetic variation intrinsic to our population .

label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: However , because the full model contains two more parameters than the model that treats sex as an additive covariate ( Equation 4 ) , the LOD score threshold for significant linkage is higher ( using the convention of Lander and Kruglyak [ 20 ] ) , with QTL - specific significance levels of 2 x 10 - 3 and 5 x 10 - 5 equivalent to LOD scores of 4 . 0 ( suggestive linkage ) and 5 . 4 ( significant linkage , equivalent to genome - wide p < 0 . 05 ) , respectively .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As a result , if there are no significant sex - additive or sex - dominant interactions , the full model will actually reduce power to detect linkage .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To minimize the loss in power of fitting the full model when the sex - interaction terms are not significant , we employed a model selection procedure that introduces sex - interaction terms only if they add significantly to the overall QTL model .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: The model selection procedure makes use of forward stepwise regression techniques to determine whether it is beneficial to include the sex - interaction terms , conditional on realizing a significant additive effect ( p < 0 . 001 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: That is , the data are fitted to Equation 4 for a given marker , and if the add term is significant at the 0 . 001 significance level , then we attempt to add the sex * add term into the model .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The sex * add term is retained in the model if the Bayesian information criterion ( BIC ) for this model is smaller than the BIC for Equation 4 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: If sex * add is included in the model as a result of this procedure , then we again use BIC to consider including the sex * dom term in the model .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To determine which of the four models ( Equations 2 , 4 , 6 , and the model selection ) is optimal , we empirically estimated the FDR for each model over a set of 3 , 000 genes randomly selected from the set of all genes detected as expressed in the liver samples .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: For each gene and for each marker we fitted each of the four models to the data .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We performed this same analysis on ten separate permutation sets in which each of the 3 , 000 gene expression trait vectors was permuted such that the correlation structure among the genes was preserved .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: The FDR for a given LOD score threshold was then computed as the ratio of the mean number of QTL detected in the permuted datasets ( the mean taken over the ten permuted datasets ) and the total number of QTL detected in the observed 3 , 000 - gene dataset .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: We then generated ROC - like curves by varying the LOD score threshold , resulting in a range of FDRs ( from 0 % to more than 50 % ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To simplify this type of summary , we considered no more than one QTL per chromosome per gene expression trait by considering only the QTL with the max LOD score on each chromosome for each trait .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GO O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O

text_a: The ROC curves for each of the four models are shown in Figure S1 , with the black curve corresponding to Equation 2 , the blue curve corresponding to Equation 4 , the red curve corresponding to Equation 6 , and the green curve corresponding to the model selection procedure .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is clear from the ROC curves that the sex and sex - interaction terms are significant in the gene expression dataset .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: For example , at an FDR of 5 % we note that 800 QTLs were detected in the set of 3 , 000 genes for model 1 , while 968 ( 21 % increase ) and 1 , 159 ( 45 % increase ) QTLs were detected for Equations 4 and 6 , respectively .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These results demonstrate significantly increased power to detect QTLs when sex is taken into account .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: We further note that the stepwise selection procedure captures more information than Equation 4 , indicating a significant interaction signature in this dataset and also demonstrating that this simple statistical procedure is capable of identifying significant interaction events even at conservative FDR thresholds .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Finally , it is of particular note that Equation 4 performed better than Equation 6 , the model that incorporated the interaction terms at all times .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: That is , despite there being a significant interaction signature , the signature was not large enough to justify including interaction terms for every expression trait and at every marker tested .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This fact motivated the need to employ the forward regression procedure , and these results further motivate the need to explore sex effects by employing even more sophisticated QTL detection methods , such as that recently described by Yi et al .

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Embryonic stem ( ES ) cells were first derived from the blastocysts of mice in 1981 [ 1 , 2 ] and humans in 1998 [ 3 ] .
label: O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: ES cells have two important properties : theability to maintain pluripotency , which is the ability to differentiate into a wide variety of cells , and rapid proliferation .
label: O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: These characteristics make mouse ES cells an essential component of gene targeting technology .
label: O O O B-Taxon O B-CL O O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: These qualitiesalso make human ES cells attractive sources for cell transplantation therapy to treat various diseases , including spinal cord injuries and juvenile diabetes .
label: O O O B-Taxon O B-CL O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The molecular mechanisms underlying the pluripotency and rapid proliferation of ES cells are currently a major focus of the field of stem cell biology [ 4 - 6 ] .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: To identify molecules essential in ES cells for these properties , several groups have utilized transcriptome analyses to identify genes specifically expressed in ES cells and early embryos .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: These analyses , including DNA microarray analyses [ 7 ] and expressed sequence tag analyses [ 8 - 12 ] , identified several common transcripts , including ESG1 that was also designated dppa5 or ECAT2 .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O

text_a: ESG1 was originally identified as a transcript Ph34 that was down - regulated by retinoic acid in embryonic carcinoma cells [ 13 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: The expression of this gene was confined in mice to early embryos and germ cells [ 14 ] .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: It is also expressed in pluripotent cells , including ES cells , embryonic germ cells , and multipotent germline stem cells [ 15 ] .
label: O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-CL O O B-CL I-CL O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: ESG1 encodes a polypeptide of 118 amino acids that contains a single KH domain , which is an RNA - binding domain [ 16 ] .
label: B-GGP O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: It remains unclear , however , if ESG1 functions as an RNA - binding protein or the roles it plays in ES cells and mice .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CL O B-Taxon O

text_a: Previous genomic library screening by identified genomic clones containing the mouse ESG1 gene and seven pseudogenes [ 17 ] .
label: O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O B-SO O O O O

label: O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O

label: O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: The chromosomal localizations of the mouse ESG1 gene and pseudogenes , however , have not been reported .
label: O B-SO I-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Identification of collagen - induced arthritis loci in aged multiparous female mice
label: O O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Collagen - induced arthritis in mice is one of the most commonly used autoimmune experimental models , with many similarities to rheumatoid arthritis .
label: B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Since collagen - induced arthritis is a complex polygenic disease there is a need for identification of several major disease - controlling genes .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Because rheumatoid arthritis particularly affects aged women , we have in the present study identified new genetic regions critical for collagen - induced arthritis by studying aged female mice of a cross between NFR / N and B10 . Q ( H - 2q haplotype ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: The mice in the present study had different reproductive histories , which did not significantly affect the onset , incidence or severity of the disease .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A total of 200 female mice were used in a total genome - wide screening with 125 microsatellite markers .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO O

text_a: We found one new significant quantitative trait locus affecting the arthritis incidence , severity and day of onset on chromosome 11 ( denoted Cia40 ) , which colocalizes with a locus controlling pregnancy failure .
label: O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , a quantitative trait locus of suggestive significance associated with the incidence , severity and day of onset was identified on chromosome 1 .
label: O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Finally , a suggestively significant quantitative trait locus associated with collagen type II antibody titers was identified on chromosome 13 .
label: O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-GO O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: This study indicates that several gene loci control arthritis in aged multiparous females , and that at least one of these loci coincides with pregnancy failure .
label: O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: The similarities between rheumatoid arthritis ( RA ) in man and collagen - induced arthritis ( CIA ) in mice are well established , although differences in the disease pattern exist [ 1 - 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Characteristic of RA is the fact that women of reproductive age are more susceptible to the disease than men [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It has also been reported that 75 % of female patients ( 23 out of 31 females ) with RA exhibit clinical remission during the course of pregnancy [ 5 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: On the other hand , it has been suggested that the onset of RA is postponed by parity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The risk of onset is reduced during pregnancy , while in the first year postpartum the chance of onset is increased [ 6 , 7 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The results of a recent study of RA in women , however , indicate that pregnancy history does not increase the incidence of the disease later in life [ 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Adequate animal models are useful tools for the identification of genes involved in complex human diseases .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: CIA in mice shares both immunological and pathological characteristics with human RA and is one of the most used models for the identification of genes and mechanisms involved in arthritis .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: The incidence of CIA is sex dependent , like the incidence in RA , although different species and different variants of the disease could lead to both male and female predominance .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Male mice are more often affected than females .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Gender differences in CIA susceptibility are dependent on many factors , including genetic , hormonal and behavioral influences [ 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , isolated factors are remarkably consistent between RA and the different animal models [ 3 , 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Pregnancy in mice , like pregnancy in women , normally causes remission of arthritis [ 5 , 10 ] , while exacerbation often occurs postpartum [ 7 , 10 , 11 ] .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pregnancy - induced remission of CIA in mice appears to be caused by the increase in estrogen levels , while the postpartum exacerbation can be explained by the dramatic drop in estrogen [ 10 ] , possibly together with increased prolactin levels [ 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: To what extent the pregnancy history ( parity ) affects the incidence of CIA later in life has , to our knowledge , not previously been studied .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Importantly , RA occurs predominantly in women , many of which have had several children , and it is therefore appropriate to also mimic this situation using animal models .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: In the present paper we have analyzed female mice that previously had undergone a reproductive study ( Liljander M , S a llstr o m MA , Andersson S , Wernhoff P , Andersson A , Holmdahl R , Mattsson R , unpublished data ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A total of 200 female mice ( ten months of age ) of the N2 backcross between NFR / N and C57BL / B10 . Q ( B10 . Q ) were used to analyze the genetic control of CIA in aged females with a multiparous history .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Induction and evaluation of CIA
label: O O O O O

text_a: To induce CIA , the mice were immunized subcutaneously at the base of the tail with 100 mu g rat collagen type II ( CII ) emulsified in 0 . 1 M acetic acid combined with an equal amount of complete Freud ' s adjuvant ( Difco Laboratories , Detroit , MI , USA ) .

label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The clinical scoring of arthritis commenced 25 days after the first immunization .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Animals were examined for clinical signs of CIA three times per week and were graded on a 12 - point scale .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The arthritis index was assigned to each mouse using the following criteria : 0 = no visible sign of arthritis , 1 = redness and swelling in a single joint , 2 = inflammation in multiple joints , and 3 = severe inflammation in the entire paw and / or anklebone .

text_a: Each paw was given the scores 0 - 3 , with the index being the sum of all four paws .

text_a: The severity trait is the maximum score observed in each individual female .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Tail biopsies were collected from all N2 females and the F0 generation .

text_a: After screening of parental DNA with approximately 450 mouse fluorescence - labeled microsatellite markers ( INTERACTIVA , Ulm , Germany ) , 125 informative markers were selected covering the genome .

text_a: PCR amplification for the markers was performed in a final volume of 10 mu l in a 96 - well V - bottom microtiter plate using 20 ng DNA , 10 mM KCl , 20 mM Tris - HCl , 10 mM ( NH4 ) 2SO4 , 2 mM MgCl2 , 0 . 1 % Triton X - 100 , pH 8 . 8 ( New England BioLabs Inc . , Ipswich , MA , USA ) , 3 mu M ( 10 pmol ) each primer , 2 mM dNTPs ( Advanced Biotechnologies , Epsom , Surrey , UK ) and 0 . 25 U Taq DNA Polymerase ( New England BioLabs Inc . ) .

text_a: The following program was used to amplify the DNA : denaturation at 95 degrees C for 3 minutes , annealing at 56 degrees C for 45 seconds , polymerization at 72 degrees C for 1 minute , 30 cycles of 95 degrees C for 30 seconds , 56 degrees C for 45 seconds and 72 degrees C for 1 minute , and a final extension step of 7 minutes at 72 degrees C .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: NFR / N female mice show delayed onset and lower incidence of CIA compared with B10 . Q females
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The onset of the disease was significantly delayed in NFR / N mice , which resulted in lower incidence in the initial phase of the disease ( Table 1 and Figure 1 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The appearance of the arthritis was slightly different between the two strains , NFR / N mice showing a higher frequency of swelling of the entire paw than B10 . Q mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Later in the disease course the differences in CIA frequency and severity between the strains were less obvious .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the anti - CII titers 100 days after primary immunization ( and 70 days after the booster ) differed significantly between NFR / N and B10 . Q female mice ( see Table 1 ) .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: Pregnancy history does not significantly affect incidence or severity of CIA in female mice of mixed genetic background
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-SO O

text_a: Table 2 presents the results of arthritic incidence , arthritis onset and maximum arthritic score for the female mice of the N2 generation , ( NFR / N x B10 . Q ) x B10 . Q , grouped according to the number of pregnancies they had experienced prior to immunization with CII .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: There was no significant difference in the incidence or severity of arthritis depending on the number of pregnancies that had been passed prior to the induction of the disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We observed a trend towards lower severity in multiparous mice compared with mice with a history of zero to two pregnancies .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The onset of diseases , however , was earlier in mice that had passed more than one pregnancy .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: There was no difference in the development of the disease between female mice that have only been pregnant with MHC mismatched males ( B10 . RIII ) and female mice that only have been pregnant with MHC matched males ( B10 . Q ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O

text_a: New loci associated with CIA in identified old female mice
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O B-Taxon

text_a: The genetic linkage analysis revealed one significant quantitative trait locus ( QTL ) located at 64 - 70 cM on chromosome 11 ( Table 3 and Figure 2 ) .
label: O B-SO O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This locus ( denoted Cia40 ) gave significant LOD scores for the traits incidence ( LOD = 4 . 1 ) and ' day of onset ' ( LOD = 4 . 0 ) , and a suggestive LOD score for the trait ' arthritis score ' ( LOD = 3 . 3 ) .
label: O B-SO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O

label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-GGP B-GO O O O O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: Although carrying the same CIA - susceptible MHC region , the NFR / N and B10 . Q mice are different in several respects .
label: O O O O O O O B-GO B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O

text_a: The NFR / N mouse , which is an inbred NMRI mouse of the H - 2q haplotype , is larger in size than the B10 . Q mouse and is also known for its extraordinarily good breeding properties .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The mice used in the present study , ( NFR / N x B10 . Q ) x B10 . Q females , first underwent a genetic study of reproduction , in which a number of loci associated with breeding performance were identified ( Liljander M , S a llstr o m MA , Andersson S , Wernhoff P , Andersson A , Holmdahl R , Mattsson R ; unpublished data ) .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Since the parental strains differ in susceptibility to CIA , in spite of both having the MHC class II A beta genes [ 15 ] , we wanted to test the susceptibility to inflammatory disease in mice from this cross .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: In fact , this situation gave an opportunity to study the genetic control of arthritis in aged multiparous females , a common situation in human RA .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: This susceptibility was important to investigate for various reasons .
label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The fact that the mice differed in their reproductive history made it possible to analyze whether this would significantly affect the incidence or severity of CIA .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Second , almost all the linkage analyses performed for detection of CIA - associated loci in mice have been carried out with male mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Another reason is that the use of old multiparous mice mimicked the RA situation ( older women is the major risk group ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Finally , the NFR / N strain had not previously been used in linkage analyses for detection of CIA - associated loci , which opened ( up ) the possibility of detecting new polymorphic genes of importance in this disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: The first conclusion from the present paper is that multiparity does not negatively influence the incidence or severity of CIA induced later in life ( Table 2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This is in agreement with results from a recent study of RA in women , which similarly indicates that previous experience of pregnancy does not negatively affect the incidence or severity of RA later in life [ 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is worth noting that the situation is quite different if pregnancy is entered during ongoing arthritis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This will normally lead to a temporary remission of the disease in both mice and humans , followed by an exacerbation phase after delivery [ 7 , 10 , 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The second conclusion from this study is that loci of possible importance for CIA have been detected , two associated with arthritis susceptibility ( chromosomes 1 and 11 ) and one associated with anti - CII titers ( chromosome 13 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-GO O O O

text_a: Some arthritis loci have previously been identified on chromosome 1 : Cia15 at 8 cM [ 16 ] , Cia20 at 44 cM [ 16 ] and Cia9 at 92 cM [ 17 ] .
label: O O B-SO O O O O O B-GO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O

text_a: However , none of these loci appears to be close to the locus found on chromosome 1 in the present study .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: The newly identified Cia40 locus includes the Ctla4 ( CD152 ) gene , which is a strong candidate associated with spontaneous diabetes identified in crosses between C57Bl and nonobese diabetic strains [ 18 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP B-SO O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Analyses of CIA in crosses of the same backgrounds , however , did not identify a linkage to this locus , suggesting that the polymorphism underlying Cia40 differs from the genes associated with diabetes [ 18 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , Bauer and colleagues previously identified a locus ( Cia28 ) associated with anti - CII antibody production at 53 cM on chromosome 13 [ 19 ] , which is approximately at the same position as where we find the linkage for this trait in the present study .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP B-GO O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is therefore most likely that the QTL we have identified on chromosome 13 is the same as Cia28 .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GO O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Since the possible new locus of potential interest on chromosome 1 was of suggestive significance , and since the locus identified on chromosome 13 probably is Cia28 , we are now paying special attention to the significant QTL for CIA incidence detected at 60 - 70 cM on chromosome 11 ( denoted Cia40 ) .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GO O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-GGP O O

text_a: No other CIA genes have previously been typed in this region , but the central part of chromosome 11 is known to contain a number of inflammation loci , such as Eae22 , Eae6b , Eae23 and Eae7 [ 20 - 22 ] .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: One QTL for proteoglycan - induced arthritis , which was female specific for disease onset , have also been found on chromosome 11 .
label: O B-SO O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Although this locus ( Pgia28 ) is not located in the vicinity of Cia40 , it is worth noting [ 23 ] .
label: O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The mouse chromosome 11 contains several genes that are highly conserved with human chromosome 17 .
label: O B-Taxon B-GO O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O B-Taxon B-GO O O

text_a: Linkages for human RA have been found in this particular region [ 24 ] .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O

text_a: Another interesting locus is Cia5 on the homolog rat chromosome 10 , which regulates the severity of CIA and pristane - induced arthritis [ 25 ] .
label: O O B-SO O B-GGP O O B-SO B-Taxon B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Interestingly , from studies with the same cross , we have previously detected a significant QTL denoted Pregq2 for the trait ' pregnancy frequency ' in the very same region as Cia40 ( peak at 64 - 70 cM on chromosome 11 ) ( Liljander M , S a llstr o m MA , Andersson S , Wernhoff P , Andersson A , Holmdahl R , Mattsson R , unpublished data ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This means that this region contains genes affecting the CIA incidence in multiparous mice in addition to the rate of successful deliveries in female mice .
label: O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: The ' pregnancy rate ' in mice is defined as successful pregnancies per detected vaginal plug , a phenotype associated with early pregnancy failure , which in turn possibly could have an inflammatory cause .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We cannot exclude that the same gene ( s ) are affecting both these traits .
label: O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Our results show that multiparity does not negatively influence the incidence or severity of CIA induced later in life .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , two new loci linked to CIA susceptibility were detected on chromosome 11 ( Cia40 ) and on chromosome 1 .
label: O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-GGP O O O B-GO O O

text_a: We detected on chromosome 13 a locus associated with anti - CII titers , which probably is the same as the recently reported Cia28 [ 19 ] .
label: O O O B-GO O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: In the development of the mammalian retina , a diverse range of cell types is generated from a pool of multipotent retinal progenitor cells .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O

text_a: Among these cell types , photoreceptors account for over 70 % of all cells in the retina .
label: O O B-CL O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: In vertebrates , there are two classes of photoreceptors , rods and cones .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O

text_a: Rods are sensors of dim light , while cones function in bright light and are responsible for color vision .
label: B-CL O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Phototransduction , a series of signal amplifications detecting a single photon of light , is initiated by the capture of light with 11 - cis - retinal , a chromophore bound by the opsin proteins : rhodopsin in rods and cone opsins in cones .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O B-GGP O B-CL O B-CL B-GGP O B-CL O

text_a: The proteins that carry out phototransduction are located in an elaborate and highly specialized membranous structure , the outer segment .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: The outer segment appears to be relatively fragile , degenerating in response to many environmental and / or genetic perturbations .
label: O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: In the rodent retina , the production of specific cell types during development progresses in a general order [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Rod photoreceptor generation peaks around the time of birth .
label: B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: Cone photoreceptors , ganglion cells , horizontal cells and amacrine cells are generated earlier , while M u ller glia and bipolar cells are generated later .
label: B-CL I-CL O B-CL I-CL O B-CL I-CL O B-CL I-CL O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O B-CL I-CL O O O O

text_a: This production of different cell types at different times appears to derive from differences in the intrinsic properties of progenitor cells involved in the transcription or chromatin modification .
label: O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: Recent studies identified several important transcription factors of photoreceptor development [ 3 - 7 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Two Otx family homeobox genes , Otx2 and Crx , play essential roles in early cell fate determination and terminal differentiation of photoreceptors [ 3 , 8 , 9 ] .
label: O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the absence of Otx2 function , differentiating photoreceptor cells are converted to amacrine - like neurons [ 9 ] .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O B-CL I-CL O O O B-CL O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: Crx , a downstream target of Otx2 , controls the transcription of various photoreceptor cell - specific genes and is essential for the formation of outer segments , synaptic terminals , and phototransduction pathways [ 8 , 10 ] .
label: B-GGP O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O B-GO B-GO O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Crx transcripts begin to be expressed in developing photoreceptors at embryonic day 12 . 5 ( E12 . 5 ) in the mouse and a strong upregulation of Crx transcription is apparent across the differentiating photoreceptors at postnatal day 6 ( P6 ) .
label: B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O

text_a: Photoreceptor cells in the Crx knockout ( KO ) mice exhibit a dramatic reduction of many photoreceptor molecules including visual pigments and develop neither photoreceptor outer segments nor a synaptic terminus [ 8 , 10 ] .
label: B-CL I-CL O O B-GGP O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CL B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O B-GO B-GO O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , mutations of human CRX have been demonstrated to be associated with three types of photoreceptor diseases : autosomal dominant cone - rod dystrophy 2 , autosomal dominant - type retinitis pigmentosa , and Leber ' s congenital amaurosis ( LCA ) [ 11 - 14 ] .

text_a: In the present study , the biochemical experiments demonstrate that the mr - s protein functions as a transcriptional repressor and possibly down - regulates the spatial and temporal expression of the target genes during retinal photoreceptor development .

text_a: Although compound heterozygosity , or the presence of two different mutant alleles of the same gene , is common in human recessive disease , its potential to impact disease outcome has not been well documented .

text_a: This is most likely because of the inherent difficulty in distinguishing specific biallelic effects from differences in environment or genetic background .

text_a: Dissection of Biallelic Effects from other Determinants of Phenotype
label: O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although phenotypic consequences , referred to here as biallelic effects , resulting from two different mutant alleles in compound heterozygote patients have been postulated , such effects have historically been difficult to distinguish from the influence of environment and genetic background .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: We used a genetically defined mammalian model system under controlled environmental conditions to reveal phenotypic effects attributable specifically to combinations of differentially mutated Xpd alleles .
label: O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: The observed biallelic effects were of three general types .
label: O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the first , the allele associated in a homozygous state with a phenotype closer to wt singularly determined the phenotypic outcome , a phenomenon widely known in human recessive disease .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Because these Xpd alleles functioned at or near wt levels with respect to a particular function , we call these effects dominant .
label: O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Such alleles can also be referred to as separation of function alleles , because they allow dissection of the roles of multifunctional proteins in specific phenotypes .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Secondly , highlighting the potential relevance of current findings to all diploid organisms including humans was the observation that in one compound heterozygous animal , the Xpd allelic relationship could shift from Adominant | arecessive to Arecessive | adominant with respect to different phenotypes in a time - dependent and tissue - specific manner ( see below and Table 2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the third type of biallelic effect , known as interallelic complementation , two mutant alleles produced a phenotype closer to wt than either could alone in a homo - or hemizygous state .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As summarised in Table 2 , examples of all types of biallelic effects were observed in a variety of Xpd - associated phenotypes , ranging from brittle hair to segmental progeria .

text_a: What does interallelic complementation tell us about the mechanism of XPD function ?

text_a: Interallelic complementation is most often observed in multimeric proteins with multiple functional domains .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO O

text_a: Unfortunately , the structure - function relationship between disease - causing mutations and XPD functional domains , including detailed structural information on XPD or even its stoichiometry within TFIIH , remains unknown .

text_a: However , based on the ability of cell extracts that are defective in two different TFIIH components ( XPD and XPB ) to complement NER activity in vitro [ 26 ] , it is likely that TFIIH ( or its components ) can either multimerise or exchange at least during the NER reaction .

text_a: We thus envisage the molecular mechanism of interallelic complementation to involve the exchange of XPD molecules within the TFIIH complex or turnover of TFIIH complexes containing different XPD molecules at the site of DNA damage during the course of the global genome as well as transcription - coupled repair of either UV - induced or endogenous DNA damage .

text_a: Thrombosis is the fatal and disabling consequence of cardiovascular diseases , the leading cause of mortality and morbidity in Western countries .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Two inbred mouse strains , C57BL / 6J and A / J , have marked differences in susceptibility to obesity , atherosclerosis , and vessel remodeling .

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Chromatin is the support of our genetic information .
label: B-GO O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: It is composed of numerous repeated units called nucleosomes , in which DNA wraps around a core of histone proteins .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O

text_a: Such modifications are termed epigenetic when they are inherited across cell divisions and confer new information to chromatin , in addition to the genetic information provided by DNA .

text_a: It is usually believed that during genome replication , the basic chromatin assembly machinery builds up na i ve nucleosomes , and , in a subsequent step , nucleosomes are selectively modified by a series of enzymes to acquire epigenetic information .

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: During mouse pre - implantation development , the genome undergoes a series of major epigenetic changes required for embryonic gene expression , the maintenance of totipotency , and the first differentiation events [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O

label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Among histone chaperones , chromatin assembly factor 1 ( CAF - 1 ) is a three - subunit ( p150 , p60 , and p48 ) complex which promotes histone H3 and H4 deposition onto newly synthesized DNA during replication or DNA repair [ 9 , 10 ] .
